exercise_requirement: Train a Text CNN and a GRU; include an LSTM variant if the diagnostic budget permits, and compare speed and parameters.
research_question: Do local n-gram features or recurrent sequence state improve classification over average pooling?
hypothesis: Text CNN will be efficient on short descriptions, while GRU may better capture ordered compatibility phrases.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
